feat.name: Revivifying Mutagen
feat.text: You metabolize a mutagen to heal yourself. You regain 1d6 Hit Points for every 2 item levels of the required mutagen (minimum 1d6 HP), but the mutagen's duration immediately ends.

traits.name: Alchemist
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the alchemist class.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

feat.requirement: You are under the effects of a mutagen.
